title: Copilot Optimisation Loop
goal: Run several Copilot-focused model CLI harness optimisation loops, fix actionable product or harness findings, and route remaining findings into issues or the weakness ledger.
non_goals: Do not run a full cross-model benchmark.
Do not make external model calls part of ordinary validation.
Do not change shipped host-repo runtime behavior unless a Copilot finding clearly requires it.

intent.outcome: Use the updated harness to run real Copilot scenarios, inspect the outputs dynamically, implement clear optimisations, rerun focused probes, and preserve unresolved findings.
intent.constraints: Keep scope bounded to model CLI harness, Copilot evaluation fixtures/scenarios/docs, weakness ledger, and any small workflow affordance directly justified by a finding.
intent.latitude: Choose scenarios dynamically, ask Copilot follow-up questions when useful, and fix harness/product ambiguity when evidence supports it.
intent.escalation: Escalate when a better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.

execution.next_step: Run Copilot harness scenarios, inspect warning output and transcripts, and implement the first actionable optimisation.
execution.proof: Focused harness tests plus make check; executed Copilot runs are dogfooding evidence, not deterministic pass/fail validation.

invariants: Preserve the planning contract and keep the work bounded to this plan.
